perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a studio setting with a man in a white T-shirt and headphones (Main Character A) sitting on an orange couch, speaking into a professional microphone and holding a smartphone. (2) The camera cuts to a woman (Main Character B) in a white mesh top sitting on a wooden chair, looking at her own phone. (3) A screen recording or high-quality insert of a Google Maps search for 'Sukiya' is shown, highlighting a search trick. (4) Another man wearing a large, yellow 'Guts' mask (Main Character C) appears on the couch next to the woman; they all hold papers and look at them while talking. (5) An image insert shows four women in Christmas-themed swimwear on a beach. (6) The scene alternates between the three speakers as they discuss various trivia facts, with dynamic zooms and cuts. (7) The video concludes with a blurred background overlayed with text inviting viewers to the full channel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo Lo-fi background music plays continuously throughout. (2) Main Character A (male) speaks with an energetic and slightly surprised tone, explaining a Google Maps trick. (3) Main Character B (female) responds with a high-pitched, surprised exclamation and laughter. (4) Main Character C (male, wearing a mask) speaks in a muffled but clear voice, providing more trivia. (5) Sounds of paper shuffling and rhythmic laughter from the group punctuate the dialogue. (6) Occasional digital sound effects (SFX) are used to emphasize transitions and text pop-ups.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '來你現在打開 Google map' (Functional: Instruction to open map). (2) '你打注音符號 すき' (Functional: Instruction to type specific symbols). (3) '有欸!!!' (Decorative: Expressing surprise). (4) '在澳洲 一年可以慶祝兩次聖誕節' (Content: Trivia about Christmas in Australia). (5) '打火機 它比火柴還要早被發明' (Content: Trivia about lighters and matches). (6) '完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看' (Functional: CTA/Outro text).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Trivia Fact 1 (Maps) -> Trivia Fact 2 (Christmas) -> Trivia Fact 3 (Lighters) -> Outro/CTA.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main hosts in studio, 4 women in swimsuit photo insert.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One male in a white t-shirt and headphones; one female in a white mesh top; one male wearing a large yellow cartoonish mask and a mint green shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio set designed like a living room with a white brick wall, wooden shelves filled with figurines (Bearbricks and anime characters), an orange leather couch, and blue curtains.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Fact 1 -> Fact 2 -> Fact 3 -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide entertaining 'did you know' trivia (infotainment) to engage the audience and redirect them to a full-length podcast or video on the main channel.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The brands shown (Sukiya) are used as examples for a search trick rather than a direct paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interaction between hosts, signature 'Guts' mask on one host, and variety-show style colorful captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'Shorts' format to tease long-form content, utilizing high-contrast visuals and rapid information delivery to maximize retention.
